description: Mr. Zhang calls Li Wei about a coffee stain and learns about warranty coverage and care tips.
visual_style: See style-guide.md for full consistency rules

scenes.title_en: A Phone Call to the Showroom
scenes.description: Mr. Zhang calls Li Wei about a stain on the sofa.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Hi Li Wei, I spilled coffee on the sofa. What should I do?
lines.zh: 嗨李伟，我把咖啡洒在沙发上了。我该怎么办？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Don't worry. Blot it gently with a clean cloth first.
lines.zh: 别担心。先用干净的布轻轻吸干。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Okay, I did that. Will it leave a stain?
lines.zh: 好的，我做了。会留下污渍吗？

scenes.description: Li Wei gives Mr. Zhang simple cleaning instructions.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Use warm water and a little mild soap on the spot.
lines.zh: 用温水和少量温和的肥皂处理污渍处。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: No, just dab it softly. Let it air dry.
lines.zh: 不用，轻轻拍打就好。让它自然风干。

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang asks whether the stain is covered by warranty.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Is this kind of damage covered by the warranty?
lines.zh: 这种损坏在保修范围内吗？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Stains from daily use are not covered, but the fabric is stain-resistant.
lines.zh: 日常使用的污渍不在保修范围内，但面料是防污的。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: I see. So I should clean it myself.
lines.zh: 明白了。所以我得自己清理。

scenes.description: Li Wei introduces the showroom's cleaning service.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: We also offer a professional cleaning service twice a year.
lines.zh: 我们还提供每年两次的专业清洁服务。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: It's free for the first year. After that, 300 RMB per visit.
lines.zh: 第一年免费。之后每次300元。

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang books the free cleaning service.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: I'd like to book the free cleaning next month.
lines.zh: 我想预约下个月的免费清洁。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Perfect. I'll arrange it for the first Saturday of next month.
lines.zh: 好的。我安排在下个月第一个周六。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: That works for me. Thank you.

scenes.description: Li Wei shares daily care advice for the sofa.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Avoid direct sunlight and vacuum the sofa weekly.
lines.zh: 避免阳光直射，每周用吸尘器清理沙发。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Good tips. I'll take good care of it.
lines.zh: 好建议。我会好好保养的。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: If you have any questions, just call us anytime.
lines.zh: 如果有任何问题，随时打电话给我们。
